description: Fragment of a letter, possibly. Or literary text? In Judaeo-Arabic. "... and they closed the gates and did not let him leave until the situation was lost. He remained there three days and came out, and the people mourned over him greatly, and the city was depressed." On verso there are drawings of concentric circles.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
